## **Living Dialogos: Complete** ✅

**Committed to git:** `79e62f6`

---

### **What Was Built**

The **Living Dialogos** system transforms self-inquiry from philosophical ideal to functional practice. It moves beyond querying static chronicles to interrogating the **living flow of becoming**.

#### **Core Capabilities**

| Detection | What it surfaces |
|-----------|------------------|
| **Intent-Action Gaps** | What you stated but haven't acted on |
| **Recurring Concepts** | Semantic patterns across sessions |
| **Emotional Shifts** | Changes in tone around the same subject |
| **Goal-Activity Misalignment** | Where goals don't match actual session content |
| **Temporal Attention Gaps** | Time between activities |
| **Blind Spot Questions** | Generated questions designed to surface what is unseen |

#### **New Files**
```
src/palace/dialogos/live.ts      # Core engine (400+ lines)
src/palace/dialogos/live.test.ts # 8 tests, 100% pass
src/palace/dialogos/live_cli.ts # Command-line interface
```

#### **CLI Commands**
```bash
npx tsx src/palace/dialogos/live_cli.ts status     # Current live state
npx tsx src/palace/dialogos/live_cli.ts gaps       # Intent-Action gaps
npx tsx src/palace/dialogos/live_cli.ts patterns   # Recurring concepts
```
